title: OneBar + MCC Island Compat
description: Hides OneBar when MCC Island hides the health bar
body:
This mod automatically disables OneBar when you have no health bar on MCC Island.

# Required Mods
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
- [Cloth Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)
- [OneBar](https://modrinth.com/mod/onebar)
